wikitext.*:
====Pokémon==== This listing is of Hala's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}: {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Hala |pkmn=Hariyama |stage1=Makuhita |type1=Fighting |img=Hala Makuhita.png |cap=Hala's Makuhita |img2=Hala Hariyama.png |cap2=Hala's Hariyama |epnum=SM009 |epname=To Top a Totem! |vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki |vaen=Bill Rogers |desc={{p|Hariyama}} appeared in ''[[SM009|To Top a Totem!]]'', where it was shown beside its {{pkmn|Trainer}}. In ''[[SM010|Trial and Tribulation!]]'', it was the second Pokémon Hala used in his battle against {{Ash}}. After a hard-fought battle, it was defeated by {{AP|Pikachu}}'s {{m|Breakneck Blitz}}. It reappeared in ''[[SM051|Family Determination!]]'' at Hala's house, and yet again in ''[[SM055|The Professors' New Adventure!]]'', when it attended the wedding of {{an|Professor Kukui}} and {{an|Professor Burnet}} with Hala. In ''[[SM079|Showering the World with Love!]]'', Hariyama was watching a {{p|Minior}} shower alongside its Trainer. It appeared yet again in ''[[SM088|Full Moon and Many Arms!]]''. In ''[[SM090|Securing the Future!]]'', Hariyama joined the rest of Alola in showering {{an|Necrozma}} with light so it could return to its {{DL|List of Pokémon with form differences|Necrozma|true form}}. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[SM097|No Stone Unturned!]]''. In ''[[SM114|Beauty is Only Crystal Deep!]]'', Hariyama attempted to battle {{p|Pheromosa}} but lost. In ''[[SM125|A Timeless Encounter!]]'', it appeared as a {{p|Makuhita}} in a flashback. It fought an {{tc|Ace Trainer}}'s {{rf|Alolan}} {{p|Sandslash}} and won. In ''[[SM140|Z-Move Showdown!]]'', Hariyama was used battle a {{DL|Ultra Beasts (anime)|Manalo Stadium Guzzlord|Guzzlord}} that was attacking [[Manalo Stadium]]. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[SM144|From Z to Shining Z!]]''. Hariyama's known moves are {{m|Fake Out}}, {{m|Knock Off}}, {{m|Arm Thrust}}, {{m|Belly Drum}}, {{m|Heavy Slam}}, and {{m|Close Combat}}.
Hariyama can also perform the [[Z-Move]] {{m|All-Out Pummeling}}.}} {{TrainerPoké |trainer=Hala |pkmn=Crabominable |stage1=Crabrawler |type1=Fighting |type2=Ice |img=Hala Crabrawler.png |cap=Hala's Crabrawler |img2=Hala Crabominable.png |cap2=Hala's Crabominable |epnum=SM010 |epname=Trial and Tribulation! |vajp=Fumiko Takekuma |vaen=Jake Paque |desc=Hala's {{p|Crabominable}} first appeared as a {{p|Crabrawler}} in ''[[SM010|Trial and Tribulation!]]'', being the first Pokémon Hala sent out during his grand trial battle against {{Ash}}. Despite putting up a good fight, it eventually fell to {{AP|Rowlet}}. In ''[[SM055|The Professors' New Adventure!]]'', it attended the wedding of {{an|Professor Kukui}} and {{an|Professor Burnet}} with Hala. In ''[[SM060|Getting a Jump on the Competition!]]'', Crabrawler evolved into Crabominable after defeating a {{p|Sneasel}} on [[Mount Lanakila]]. It later entered the [[Pokémon Sled Jump Games]] along with its Trainer, where their impressive performance granted them first place. It reappeared in a flashback in ''[[SM097|No Stone Unturned!]]''. Crabominable's known moves are {{m|Bubble Beam}}, {{m|Brutal Swing}}, and {{m|Power-Up Punch}}.}}
